title: Rav Bralor
content:

{{Quote|If Zey thinks ''I'm'' trouble, he'll have a nasty shock if he gets Rav Bralor. You know what ''Mando'' females are like.|Kal Skirata|<ref name="Republic Commando: True Colors">''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]''</ref>}}
'''Rav Bralor''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warrior who was active during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[File:FullArmorRavBralor.jpg|thumb|left|Rav Bralor in full armor]]
Rav Bralor was one of seventy-five [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Cuy'val Dar]] training [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeants]] for the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]], personally recruited by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. After the completion of the duties of the Cuy'val Dar, [[Gender/Legends|she]] presumably returned to [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. Midway through the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] she was asked by Sergeant [[Kal Skirata]] to maintain [[Kyrimorut/Legends|Kyrimorut]], his future home and bastion of the [[Clan Skirata|Skirata clan]], in the northern forests of Mandalore. Skirata returned to Mandalore 480 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] with a very pregnant [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] after deciding that Mandalore was the safest place for Tur-Mukan, a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]], to give birth in secret. Bralor had the home ready for them and helped them settle into their surroundings.

[[File:RavBralorHelmetOff.jpg|thumb|Right|Rav Bralor.]]
Bralor and her niece [[Parja Bralor|Parja]] were present for the birth of [[Venku Skirata]] and for the arrival of [[Fi Skirata]] after he suffered [[Brain/Legends|brain]] trauma at the [[Battle of Gaftikar]]. Bralor trained a full company of [[Clone commando/Legends|Republic commandos]], including [[Vevut Squad]] and [[Yayax Squad]]. The Commandos of Yayax deserted the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] and came to Mandalore to live with [[Clan Bralor|Bralor]] and the Skirata clan. Later she was present when the body of Tur-Mukan was brought to Mandalore and prepared Tur-Mukan's body for [[Cremation/Legends|cremation]].

==Personality and traits==
Bralor was described by Etain Tur-Mukan as 'frighteningly fit' and was a competent [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] with a strong dislike of [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoans]] and little patience for dithering from commanding [[Officer/Legends|officers]]. She and Kal Skirata were close friends and comrades-in-arms long before their service as Cuy'val Dar and shared many similar attitudes towards the clones they trained, such as treating them like their own son's. Indeed, it was observed that the clones of Yayax Squad in particular acted like children eager to please their mother when in close proximity to her.

==Behind the scenes==
Bralor's figurine bears a strong resemblance to illustrations of [[Vhonte Tervho]].
